title: Re:Animal
description: Intelligent new animals that make the world livelier
body:
Re:Animal is a mod that adds several new animals to the game, significantly enhancing the visual and behavioral diversity of the world. Each creature has its own set of behaviors and a unique level of intelligence, making the environment react to the player and events in a much more natural way. Animals interact with each other, explore their surroundings and choose preferred biomes.

In addition, most species can be tamed and bred, granting access to resources, new types of food, and decorative elements. The mod fits perfectly into modpacks both for players who enjoy peaceful survival and dream of creating their own zoo, and for those who always felt the standard Minecraft world lacked vibrancy and life.
